mapper.sql: id, openid, type, alipay_account, extensionAccount, phone, createTime, version, headImg, wxname

a.id, a.openid,a.unionid,a.third_openid as thirdOpenid, a.type, a.alipay_account as alipayAccount, a.extensionAccount, a.bindAccount,a.headImg, a.wxname,a.phone, a.createTime, a.version,b.bankcard,b.bankUserName, b.bankName, b.bankSecondName, b.idcard, (CASE WHEN b.id is null THEN 0 WHEN b.status = 4 THEN 3 WHEN b.status = 5 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) as userType, b.account
mapper.update: update biz_wx_user set alipay_account = #{alipayAccount} where openid = #{openid}
update biz_wx_user set phone = #{phone} where openid = #{openid}
update biz_wx_user set third_openid = #{thirdOpenId} where openid = #{openid}
mapper.select:
select
from biz_wx_user a left join sys_user b on a.phone = b.phone and a.phone is not null and a.phone != '' and b.status != 3 where a.openid = #{openid}

select wxname,headImg from biz_wx_user
and extensionAccount = #{bizWxUser.extensionAccount}
